'''zhavufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uint|uint]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uint|uint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhavufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhævifith|zhævifith]] || [[word:zhævifij|zhævifij]] || [[word:zhævifish|zhævifish]] || [[word:zhævifi|zhævifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhavuvufuth|zhavuvufuth]] || [[word:zhavuvufuj|zhavuvufuj]] || [[word:zhavuvufush|zhavuvufush]] || [[word:zhavuvufu|zhavuvufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhavufuth|zhavufuth]] || [[word:zhavufuj|zhavufuj]] || [[word:zhavufush|zhavufush]] || [[word:zhavufu|zhavufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhavuffuth|zhavuffuth]] || [[word:zhavuffuj|zhavuffuj]] || [[word:zhavuffush|zhavuffush]] || [[word:zhavuffuf|zhavuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhavufuthu|zhavufuthu]] || [[word:zhavufuju|zhavufuju]] || [[word:zhavufushu|zhavufushu]] || [[word:zhavufuku|zhavufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhavufuth|zhavufuth]] || [[word:zhavufuj|zhavufuj]] || [[word:zhavufush|zhavufush]] || [[word:zhavufu|zhavufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhavufuthul|zhavufuthul]] || [[word:zhavufujul|zhavufujul]] || [[word:zhavufushul|zhavufushul]] || [[word:zhavufukul|zhavufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhavufuthuthu|zhavufuthuthu]] || [[word:zhavufujuju|zhavufujuju]] || [[word:zhavufushushu|zhavufushushu]] || [[word:zhavufuku|zhavufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhavufuthun|zhavufuthun]] || [[word:zhavufujun|zhavufujun]] || [[word:zhavufushun|zhavufushun]] || [[word:zhavufukun|zhavufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhavufuthuoro|zhavufuthuoro]] || [[word:zhavufujuoro|zhavufujuoro]] || [[word:zhavufushuoro|zhavufushuoro]] || [[word:zhavufukuoro|zhavufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
